resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-bond-prices
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool bond prices
resourceTemplates.description: Returns historical OHLC price data and volume for a bond identified by its ISIN.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-bond-list
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool bond list
resourceTemplates.description: Returns a paginated list of bonds. Supports filtering by keyword (ISIN or description), exchange code, and pagination.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-bond-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool bond profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns profile information for a bond identified by its ISIN, including coupon, maturity date, issuer details and classification.
